headlines.description: — CJ McCollum’s half-court shot at the buzzer was ruled no good after a review and the New York Knicks held off the Atlanta Hawks 108-105 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks edge Hawks 108-105 after quick review wipes out McCollum's half-court buzzer-beater

headlines.description: — Paolo Banchero scored 31 points, Desmond Bane added 25 and the Orlando Magic beat the Detroit Pistons 123-107 on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Banchero scores 31, Bane adds 25 to help the Magic turn back the Pistons 123-107

headlines.description: — Evan Mobley scored 24 points, Dennis Schroder had 22 points and 11 assists, and the Cleveland Cavaliers beat Memphis 142-126 on Monday night despite the Grizzlies tying the NBA single-game record with 29 3-pointers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cavaliers beat Memphis 142-126 as Grizzlies match NBA single-game record with 29 3-pointers
